original_image_tags: Large, hollow, red capital letters "COPY" stamped diagonally across the bottom of the page, partially obscuring the final lines of text.

elements.description: A scanned page of typewritten text. At the top, it reads 'Page 6'. At the bottom, there is a large, faint, red 'COPY' watermark overlaid on the text. There are no photographs, sketches, diagrams, maps, or charts.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the presence of a 'COPY' watermark and the absence of other visual elements, but they disagree on specific verbatim text details: 'COPY' is described as 'hollow, red capital letters' stamped diagonally in A, and as a 'large, faint, red' watermark in B.
